title: GarageMate — Workshop ERP
overview: GarageMate is a specialized ERP system designed for automotive workshops and service centers. It manages the entire customer journey from vehicle check-in and inventory tracking to invoicing and service history management.
problem: Workshop owners often struggle with manual job card management, inaccurate inventory tracking, and poor communication with vehicle owners. This leads to delayed vehicle delivery, missed billing, and low customer satisfaction.
solution: GarageMate digitizes every aspect of workshop operations. It provides clear visibility into active jobs, automates inventory updates, and simplifies the invoicing process, ensuring a professional and efficient service experience.
howItWorks: Vehicle Check-in: Create digital job cards with photos and detailed service requirements upon arrival.
Service Orchestration: Assign technicians to specific tasks and monitor job progress in real-time.
Inventory Integration: Automatically deduct parts from stock as they are added to job cards.
Client Communication: Send automated status updates and digital estimates to customers.
Checkout & Analytics: Generate GST-ready invoices and track business performance through profitability reports.
features: Digital Job Cards: Replace paper with easy-to-manage digital service records.
Inventory Management: Real-time tracking of spare parts with low-stock alerts.
Technician Portal: Dedicated view for mechanics to update their progress.
Service History: Complete digital records for every vehicle that visits the workshop.
Automated Billing: Instant generation of estimates and final invoices.
Customer Follow-ups: Remind clients about upcoming service intervals via SMS/WhatsApp.
useCases: Multi-Brand Workshops: Manage diverse vehicle types and parts requirements efficiently.
Authroized Service Centers: Standardize processes and maintain detailed audit trails.
Car Detailers: Track high-touch service packages and manage appointment schedules.
Spare Part Retailers: Integrate sales with workshop demand for optimized stock levels.
whyBetter: Streamlined Admin: Reduces time spent on paperwork by up to 60%.
Leakage Prevention: Ensures every nut and bolt used is billed correctly.
Professional Image: Impresses clients with digital estimates and professional invoices.
Built for India: Fully GST-compliant with support for local workshop workflows.
summary: GarageMate transforms workshop chaos into organized efficiency, helping automotive businesses provide superior service while maximizing their profitability.
